agentdeck.note: Codex thread-title hooks have no Claude equivalent.

apple-dev-skills.note: Privacy, sandbox file-access, entitlement, and virtualization guidance is portable; Xcode bridges, visible permission actions, and VM execution require an approved local Mac context.

cardhop-app.note: Cardhop server runs on the local Mac.

cloud-inference-skills.note: Runpod endpoints are public remote MCP services; authentication remains operator-managed.

cybersecurity-skills.note: Instruction-only workflows; analysis-lab execution remains local and approval-gated.

model-lab-skills.note: Portable instruction workflows with local deterministic Python helpers; no host-specific runtime surface.

productivity-skills.note: Dice is a public remote MCP server.

reverse-engineering-skills.note: Instruction-only workflows, including exact-build macOS control research; local artifacts and active probes remain operator-provided and approval-gated.

server-side-swift.note: Instruction-only workflows; Apple container execution requires a supported local Mac.

speak-swiftly.note: The standalone payload auto-loads a Codex-only hook with a hard-coded Codex cache path; add a Claude-native payload there before exposing it here.

spotify.note: Socket placeholder without a usable skill payload.

swiftasb-skills.note: Skill guidance is portable; live Codex app-server probes remain Codex-specific.

things-app.note: Things server runs on the local Mac.
